title: Averta OS
description: Averta secures AI agents in production. It classifies every prompt, tool call, and output for intent and risk, enforces per-agent tool policies, governs MCP server access through a gateway, and produces an audit trail of every agent decision.

items: Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
